content:
🚀 TCS Career Opportunities 2026 | Freshers & Experienced Professionals



Looking to build your career with one of India's leading IT companies? TCS is hiring talented individuals across multiple domains. Whether you're a fresher or an experienced professional, this could be your next career move.



🎓 Who Can Apply? ✅ Freshers & Experienced Candidates

✅ Recent Graduates

✅ Final-Year Students

✅ Diploma & Degree Holders



💼 Opportunities Available In: • Software Development

• Data Analytics

• Cloud & DevOps

• Cybersecurity

• AI & Machine Learning

• Testing & Quality Assurance

• Business Process Services

• HR, Finance & Operations

• Customer Support & More



🌟 Why Consider TCS? ✔ Competitive Salary Packages

✔ Learning & Career Growth Opportunities

✔ Work-Life Balance

✔ Training & Upskilling Programs

✔ PAN India Opportunities (Role Dependent)



📌 Interested? Comment "INTERESTED" below, and I'll share the application details.

📧 Alternatively, you may also share your updated CV/Resume at: pratimahr72@gmail.com

Our team will review eligible profiles and contact shortlisted candidates regarding the next steps.

🔔 Follow my profile for daily updates on verified job opportunities, internships, and career tips.

comment: Hiring at scale is only the first step; candidates should also focus on role alignment, hands-on projects, and continuous upskilling to stand out in a competitive IT talent market.
